Advanced Discord Security

Protect Your Discord Server with Prevent

Advanced anti-raid, anti-spam, and security features to keep your Discord community safe. Easy setup, powerful protection, and comprehensive management tools.

Get Started Learn More

Powerful Security Features

Everything you need to keep your Discord server safe and well-managed

Anti-Raid Protection
Advanced algorithms detect and prevent raid attempts automatically
  • Mass join detection
  • Automatic lockdown
  • Smart verification
Anti-Spam System
Intelligent spam detection with customizable filters and actions
  • Message rate limiting
  • Duplicate detection
  • Auto-moderation
Safe Links
Protect your members from malicious links and phishing attempts
  • Real-time scanning
  • Phishing protection
  • Custom whitelist
Welcome System
Customizable welcome messages with embeds and role assignment
  • Custom embeds
  • Auto-role assignment
  • Welcome channels
Easy Management
Intuitive dashboard and slash commands for easy configuration
  • Web dashboard
  • Slash commands
  • Real-time logs
High Performance
Lightning-fast response times with 99.9% uptime guarantee
  • Low latency
  • Reliable hosting
  • 24/7 monitoring

Ready to Secure Your Server?

Join thousands of Discord servers already protected by Prevent
